DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: NAVETTE JOSLYN, ESQ., 415.459.9865, FOR CROSS COMPLAINANT PROTRANSPORT-1 LLC.
LADELL H. MUHLESTEIN, ESQ., 213.624.6900, FOR CROSS DEFENDANT INNOVATIVE BUSINESS SOLUTIONS.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: CROSS DEFENDANT INNOVATIVE BUSINESS SOLUTIONS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Overruled. Cross Complainant has pled sufficient facts to constitute a cause of action for breach of an oral contrac, negligent performance of a service contract and implied contractual indemnity. The cross-complaint is not uncertain. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: NAVETTE JOSLYN, ESQ., 415.459.9865, FOR CROSS COMPLAINANT PROTRANSPORT-1 LLC.
LADELL H. MUHLESTEIN, ESQ., 213.624.6900, FOR CROSS DEFENDANT INNOVATIVE BUSINESS SOLUTIONS.

RULING: no argument. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT INNOVATIVE BUSINESS SOLUTIONS, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is Denied. The specified allegations are not improper, or not drawn in conformity with California law. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KYLE NORDREHAUG OF THE BLUMENTHAL, NORDREHAUG & BHOWMILK LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (858) 551-1223 EXT. 2 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. NANETTE JOSLYN OF THE JORDAN LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 459-9869 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PROTRANSPORT-1, LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is Denied. Plaintiff has standing under the plain language of Business and Professions Code section 17204. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR # 5153 =302/EG

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KYLE NORDREHAUG OF THE BLUMENTHAL, NORDREHAUG & BHOWMILK LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (858) 551-1223 EXT. 2 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. NANETTE JOSLYN OF THE JORDAN LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 459-9869 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PROTRANSPORT-1, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. Assuming without deciding that Code of Civil Procedure section 338(a)'s one-year statute of limitations applies, Plaintiff seeks and is granted leave to amend to add additional plaintiffs whose employment terminated within the last year. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR # 5153 =302/EG
